name: Mondelez International
analysis: It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $62.1650, stop $58.8555, target $72.0935 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
